tools.name: Vector Database
tools.description: Stores embeddings and enables fast similarity/semantic search for AI applications.

tools.name: Python Data Analysis
tools.description: Used for ML pipelines, statistical analysis, and data processing workflows.

tools.name: Web Scraper
tools.description: Extracts structured data from websites for dataset creation and monitoring.

tools.name: LLM API Integration
tools.description: Connects to large language model APIs like OpenAI, Gemini, or Anthropic for AI-powered text tasks.

tools.name: REST API Builder
tools.description: Framework for building and exposing REST APIs to serve data or trigger actions.

tools.name: SQL Database
tools.description: Relational database for storing and querying structured data with SQL.

tools.name: NoSQL Database
tools.description: Document or key-value store for flexible, schema-less data storage.

tools.name: Authentication & Auth
tools.description: Handles user authentication, JWT tokens, OAuth flows, and role-based access control.

tools.name: Cloud Storage
tools.description: Stores files, images, and documents in scalable cloud storage buckets.

tools.name: Task Queue / Background Jobs
tools.description: Processes long-running or scheduled tasks asynchronously without blocking the main thread.

tools.name: Data Visualization
tools.description: Creates interactive charts, dashboards, and visual reports from data.

tools.name: CI/CD Pipeline
tools.description: Automates testing, building, and deploying applications on code changes.

tools.name: Email & Notification Service
tools.description: Sends transactional emails, push notifications, and automated alerts.

tools.name: React Frontend
tools.description: Builds interactive single-page web applications and dashboards.

tools.name: Docker & Containerization
tools.description: Packages and runs applications in isolated containers for consistent deployments.

tools.name: Web Search API
tools.description: Queries search engines to retrieve current information from the web.

tools.name: Caching Layer
tools.description: Stores frequently accessed data in memory for fast retrieval and reduced latency.

tools.name: PDF / Document Parser
tools.description: Extracts text and structured data from PDFs, Word docs, and other document formats.

tools.name: Model Training Pipeline
tools.description: Builds, trains, and evaluates machine learning or deep learning models.

tools.name: Monitoring & Logging
tools.description: Tracks application health, logs errors, and sends alerts on failures.
